_comment: Verified hook stats per topic. overlay_number = big text on screen. overlay_subtitle = short claim under number. hook_statement = full opening sentence for voiceover. Never change a stat without re-verifying the source.

compound interest.hook_statement: Waiting 10 years to start investing forces you to save 4 times as much to reach the same goal.
compound interest.source: SEC Office of Investor Education — Compound Interest Calculator

Roth IRA basics.overlay_subtitle: of workers use a Roth IRA
Roth IRA basics.hook_statement: Only 17% of American workers contribute to a Roth IRA, and most are leaving tax-free growth behind.

emergency fund rule.hook_statement: 56% of Americans could not cover a $1,000 emergency expense without going into debt.

credit score quick wins.overlay_subtitle: of your score is one habit
credit score quick wins.hook_statement: 35% of your credit score is determined by a single habit: paying on time.

401k employer match.hook_statement: 26% of workers don't contribute enough to capture their full employer 401k match, leaving free money on the table.

debt avalanche vs snowball.hook_statement: The average American pays $2,100 a year in credit card interest — and most are using the wrong payoff method.

salary negotiation.hook_statement: Fewer than 40% of workers negotiated their last job offer, and those who didn't lost an average of $5,000 a year.

index funds explained.overlay_subtitle: of active funds lose to the index
index funds explained.hook_statement: 92% of actively managed funds underperformed their benchmark index over 15 years.

budget 50/30/20 rule.hook_statement: 60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, and most don't have a working budget.

high yield savings account.overlay_subtitle: avg bank savings rate right now
high yield savings account.hook_statement: The average bank savings account pays just 0.46% — while high-yield accounts pay over 5%.
high yield savings account.source: FDIC National Rates and Rate Caps 2024

tax brackets explained.overlay_subtitle: extra tax on your whole income
tax brackets explained.hook_statement: Getting a raise never lowers your take-home pay — a higher bracket taxes only the dollars above the threshold.
tax brackets explained.source: IRS Publication 17 — Your Federal Income Tax

student loan payoff strategy.hook_statement: $1.77 trillion in student loan debt is outstanding in the US, and most borrowers are using the slowest payoff order.
student loan payoff strategy.source: Federal Reserve Consumer Credit G.19 Release Q3 2024

investing in your 20s vs 30s.hook_statement: Starting to invest at 35 instead of 25 forces you to save roughly 4 times as much each month to hit the same retirement target.
investing in your 20s vs 30s.source: SEC Office of Investor Education — Compound Growth

car loan trap.hook_statement: The average new car payment hit $726 a month in 2024 — and that's quietly killing millions of wealth-building plans.
car loan trap.source: Experian State of the Automotive Finance Market Q3 2024

net worth calculation.hook_statement: The median net worth for Americans under 35 is just $39,000 — and most don't even know their number.
net worth calculation.source: Federal Reserve Survey of Consumer Finances 2022

expense ratio drag.overlay_subtitle: lost to a 1% fund fee over 30 yrs
expense ratio drag.hook_statement: A 1% annual fee on a $100,000 portfolio quietly costs you over $100,000 in lost growth over 30 years.
expense ratio drag.source: SEC Office of Investor Education — Mutual Fund Fees

dollar cost averaging.hook_statement: The average investor underperforms the market by 4.7% per year — mostly from trying to time it.
dollar cost averaging.source: DALBAR Quantitative Analysis of Investor Behavior 2023

S&P 500 vs total market.hook_statement: A total market fund holds over 3,500 more stocks than the S&P 500, adding small- and mid-cap growth quietly.
S&P 500 vs total market.source: Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund Prospectus 2024

HSA triple tax advantage.overlay_subtitle: of HSA holders invest the balance
HSA triple tax advantage.hook_statement: Only 9% of HSA account holders invest their balance — the other 91% are missing the triple tax advantage.
HSA triple tax advantage.source: Employee Benefit Research Institute HSA Database 2023

backdoor Roth IRA.hook_statement: $161,000 is the income limit where Roth IRA contributions phase out in 2024 — but there's a legal workaround.

529 plan basics.overlay_subtitle: of parents haven't saved for college
529 plan basics.hook_statement: 57% of parents have not started saving for their child's college education.
529 plan basics.source: Sallie Mae How America Pays for College 2023

401k vesting schedule.hook_statement: 33% of workers leave their job before hitting the vesting cliff, forfeiting thousands in employer match they already earned.
401k vesting schedule.source: Bureau of Labor Statistics National Compensation Survey 2022

ESPP discount math.hook_statement: Most ESPPs offer a 15% guaranteed discount on company stock — and the majority of eligible employees skip it.
ESPP discount math.source: National Association of Stock Plan Professionals NASPP Survey 2023

job hopping salary growth.hook_statement: Job switchers earn 9.4% more on average than workers who stay — and the gap compounds every year.
job hopping salary growth.source: ADP Research Institute Workforce Vitality Report 2023

raise vs bonus tax impact.hook_statement: Your bonus is withheld at a flat 22% federal rate — which is why it feels smaller than your regular paycheck.

W-4 withholding reset.overlay_subtitle: avg tax refund — a free IRS loan
W-4 withholding reset.hook_statement: The average tax refund in 2024 was $3,011 — money you loaned the IRS interest-free all year.

capital gains tax basics.hook_statement: If your taxable income is under $47,025, your long-term capital gains tax rate is 0% in 2024.

RMD rules explained.hook_statement: Missing a required minimum distribution triggers a 25% excise tax on the amount you failed to withdraw.

credit utilization rule.overlay_subtitle: utilization ceiling for a strong score
credit utilization rule.hook_statement: Keeping your credit utilization below 30% is one of the fastest ways to raise your score without paying anything extra.

balance transfer card math.hook_statement: The average credit card APR hit 22.8% in 2024 — and a 0% balance transfer can legally reset that clock.
balance transfer card math.source: Federal Reserve Consumer Credit G.19 Release 2024

APR vs APY.overlay_subtitle: hidden gap between APR and APY
APR vs APY.hook_statement: APR and APY can differ by over 0.5% — and lenders use whichever number looks better to them.
APR vs APY.source: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau — Understanding APR and APY

sinking funds method.hook_statement: Americans take on an average of $1,300 in debt each holiday season — a problem sinking funds prevent entirely.

zero based budgeting.overlay_subtitle: of Americans keep a monthly budget
zero based budgeting.hook_statement: Only 32% of Americans maintain a monthly household budget, yet budgeters build wealth faster.
zero based budgeting.source: Gallup Economy and Personal Finance Survey 2023

pay yourself first.hook_statement: Americans save only 3.6% of disposable income on average — far below the 15% financial planners recommend.
pay yourself first.source: Bureau of Economic Analysis Personal Income and Outlays 2024

biweekly payment strategy.hook_statement: Switching to biweekly mortgage payments can shorten a 30-year loan by up to 6 years without refinancing.
biweekly payment strategy.source: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau — Mortgage Payment Strategies

rent vs buy break-even.hook_statement: In most US cities, buying a home breaks even versus renting in about 4 years — but that window is shifting.
rent vs buy break-even.source: Zillow Research — Rent vs Buy Report 2024

insurance deductible strategy.overlay_subtitle: of bankruptcies tied to medical costs
insurance deductible strategy.hook_statement: 62% of US personal bankruptcies are linked to medical costs — and the right deductible strategy reduces that risk.
insurance deductible strategy.source: American Journal of Public Health — Medical Bankruptcy Study

financial independence number.hook_statement: Multiply your annual spending by 25 — that's your financial independence number, backed by 30 years of research.
financial independence number.source: Trinity Study — Sustainable Withdrawal Rates 1998, updated 2011

cash flow review habit.hook_statement: The average American wastes $219 a month on subscriptions they forgot they signed up for.

401k loan risks.overlay_subtitle: of 401k holders have an active loan
401k loan risks.hook_statement: 13% of 401k participants currently have an outstanding loan against their retirement savings — at a hidden cost most don't see.
